sentences.arabic: أَحَبَّ الطِّفْلُ الْعَصِيرَ الطَّبِيعِيَّ أَكْثَرَ مِنَ الْمَعْبَأِ.
sentences.translation: Dijete je više voljelo prirodni sok nego pakovan.
sentences.translationEn: The child liked fresh juice more than packaged juice.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْأُمُّ تَعْصِرُ الْبُرْتُقَالَ كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ.
sentences.translation: Majka je cijedila narandže svako jutro.
sentences.translationEn: The mother used to squeeze oranges every morning.

sentences.translation: Sok je bio svjež, sladak i zdrav.
sentences.translationEn: The juice was fresh, sweet, and healthy.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الطِّفْلُ يَنْتَظِرُهُ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ بِفَرَحٍ.
sentences.translation: Dijete ga je svaki dan radosno čekalo.
sentences.translationEn: The child waited for it happily every day.
